title: osyris rhamnoides
intro: Osyris rhamnoides, also known as the Prickly Ash or Osyris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is a small, evergreen shrub with thorns and fragrant flowers. Osyris rhamnoides has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves.
